metadata.title: systemic-tau-formal: Machine-verifiable Systemic Tau (τₛ) and RECD
metadata.description:
systemic-tau-formal v0.1.9 is an open monorepo for machine-checkable formalization and reproducible reference code of the Systemic Tau (τₛ) paradigm and the Discrete Extramental Clock (RECD).

What is new in v0.1.9

  • ThresholdFromDelta: unique operational inverse-scale bridge f(δ)=c/δ with pin f(δ_op)=τ_ch, scale constant c⋆=τ_ch·δ_op, antitonicity, band/gate compatibility, and κ-scaled relation to the simple candidate 2/δ. Classical free-c derivation remains open (naive 2/δ fails machine-checked).
  • failedSimpleCandidates extended (10 rational forms ≠ τ_ch): includes 2/(δ+1), (δ−2)/δ, 3/(2δ), 4/δ², 5/δ.
  • Ontology: L0–L3 claim registry, stratifiedFour, well-sited claims; package for the f(δ) bridge.
  • Still zero sorry / zero research axiom under SystemicTau/.
  • GitHub: closed good-first #7; community tracks #1–#4,#6 updated.

Carried from v0.1.8

  • Lab/construction Feigenbaum pack: non-tent tauReturnFour, logistic scale-ID, C²/Schwarzian algebra, geometric cascade → δ_op.
  • Lean 4.14 + Mathlib; Python golden bridge; CI; Aedes/C3 paths.

Still research-scale

  • Classical free-c derivation of τ_ch from pure Feigenbaum
  • Termwise superstable logistic roots; Mathlib C²-open renorm
  • Field-derived continuum return of τₛ
  • Multi-site empirical P1/P4 discharge

Companion: PyPI systemictau. Prior corpus DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20576241.

Epistemic honesty: operational thresholds 0.50 / 0.41 remain protocol pins; uniqueness of f is inside the inverse-scale class with operational pin — not classical universality.

creators.name: Padilla-Villanueva, Johel
creators.affiliation: University of Puerto Rico, Medical Sciences Campus

metadata.notes: CI: GitHub Actions (pytest + lake build). Verify: clone, lake build, pytest -q. Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21516059. Formal obligations: docs/FORMAL_OBLIGATIONS.md. Zero sorry / zero research axiom under lean/SystemicTau/.
